description.value:
You gain nourishment in the same way that the plants or fungi that match your body type normally do, through some combination of photosynthesis, absorbing minerals with your roots, or scavenging decaying matter. You typically don't need to pay for food.

If you're photosynthetic, you can absorb energy from natural sunlight or artificial sources like full-spectrum LED lighting. Most starships and settlements have suitable light sources, and flashlights can be modified with LEDs at no cost to replenish your energy with 3 hours of exposure (or 1 hour for a tactical flashlight).
